summary: Code review verified both bug fixes are correctly implemented. Unable to perform UI testing due to external URL showing Replit placeholder 'Run this app to see the results here.' - the frontend is running correctly on localhost:3000 (verified with curl) but the external preview URL is not routing properly. This is an infrastructure/environment issue, not a code issue.

infrastructure_issues.details: https://064fac1e-c012-4dd9-814f-9977bb551467-00-3a7s7gy19c79n.spock.replit.dev shows 'Run this app to see the results here' Replit placeholder instead of the app
infrastructure_issues.internal_status: Frontend runs correctly on localhost:3000 (verified with curl)

5 sections: PRE-SERVICE SETUP (10 items), TECHNICAL RUN-THROUGH (8 items), LIVE PRODUCTION MONITORING (5 items), EQUIPMENT HANDOVER (3 items), DEBRIEF & FEEDBACK (3 items)

action_items: INFRASTRUCTURE: External preview URL (https://064fac1e-c012-4dd9-814f-9977bb551467-00-3a7s7gy19c79n.spock.replit.dev) is not routing to frontend - needs investigation
NOTE: All code changes are correctly implemented - bug fixes are ready for user testing once URL is accessible
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: getMemberName() function in AssignRotas.js is defined but never used (eslint warning) - can be removed or used
Both AssignRotas.js and Checklists.js have duplicate CHECKLIST_ITEMS definitions - consider extracting to shared constant

success_rate.frontend: Code Review: 100% verified, UI Testing: Unable to perform due to external URL issue

context_for_next_testing_agent: All bug fixes verified via code review. External URL not accessible - shows Replit placeholder. Frontend runs on localhost:3000. When URL becomes accessible, test: 1) Demo mode login 2) Navigate to /assign-rotas 3) Select service, weekly lead, add members, create rota 4) Navigate to /checklists and verify 29 items in 5 sections with toggle functionality 5) Check MyRotas page for '+ Assign Rotas' link with director role
